ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network device where the metrics were collected */,
  "interface_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the interface on the device */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the traffic (e.g., inbound, outbound) */,
  "application_protocol" TEXT /* Application protocol (e.g., HTTP, FTP) */,
  "packet_loss" INTEGER /* Number of packets lost */,
  "loss_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of packets lost */,
  "time_delta_mean" REAL /* Mean time delta between packets */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time for the measurement */,
  "total_bytes" INTEGER /* Total number of bytes transferred */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput in kilobits per second (Kbps) */,
  "packet_size" INTEGER /* Size of the packet in bytes */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Variation in packet latency */,
  "latency" REAL /* Delay in packet transmission */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Rate of errors in the network */,
  "retransmission_rate" REAL /* Rate of packet retransmissions */,
  "packet_count" INTEGER /* Total number of packets */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Brief description or note about the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the network device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the network device */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Location of the network device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the network device */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the network device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the network device (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., router, switch) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update or maintenance date */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Installation date of the device */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Point of contact for the device */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_devices_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., wired, wireless) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, IT support, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metrics */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES network_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high packet loss, low throughput) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* User or team the alert is assigned to */,
  "resolution_time" REAL /* Time taken to resolve the alert */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the alert */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Notification status (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES network_metrics ("metric_id")
)
